# Versions pinned for reproducibility (Python 3.10+).
# Re-check / update pins if this file is generated much later than the project start date.
# torch + transformers + accelerate co-resolved for Trainer compatibility.
# For CUDA wheels, install torch from https://pytorch.org first, then:
#   pip install -r deployment/requirements.txt
# Docker (CPU) uses the PyPI torch wheel from this file.

# Core ML / training
torch==2.6.0
transformers==4.48.3
datasets==3.2.0
scikit-learn==1.5.2
accelerate==1.2.1
numpy==1.26.4
pandas==2.2.3

# API / serving
fastapi==0.115.5
uvicorn[standard]==0.32.1
pydantic==2.10.2

# Utilities
pyyaml==6.0.2
matplotlib==3.9.2
seaborn==0.13.2
